devnotes.summary: Creates new TMemIniFile instance with initially specified FileName, Encoding and CaseSensitive property values. Which will be used to load the file content.
Returns True if the content was modified after loading the file or after last UpdateFile call. Property may be set manually to control automatic file saving when AutoSave is True.

When value is True, then content will be automatically saved in specified file at destruction, if content was modified. When value is False, then content will be not automatically saved. To save the content use UpdateFile method.

const.name: dWg
const.devnotes: Inifiles redefined to TMemIniFile for using in memory

enum.name: TVGParsFromTexture
enum.devnotes: matrix potential of very dry soil

enum.name: Tm_model
enum.devnotes: type for calculaiton options of evaporation

enum.name: TLowerBoundaryCondition
enum.devnotes: type of model for calculating the parameter 'm' within the van Genuchten model

enum.name: TCompMethod
enum.devnotes: type for specifying lower boundary conditions

enum.name: TIniMethod
enum.devnotes: type for specifying computation method for nFK

array.name: TSoilWaterParams
array.devnotes: Type of soil evaporation reduction function

element.devnotes: Type of soil evaporation reduction function

field.name: ResetTimeStep
field.devnotes: Component implementing vertical soil water transport

field.name: last_iter
field.devnotes: flag for start of a new day

field.name: Iter_save
field.devnotes: number of iterations during previous internal time step

field.name: delt_iter_max
field.devnotes: total number of iterations during internal time step

field.name: max_flow_ratio
field.devnotes: maximum water content change within a single layer during an internal time step

field.name: theta_airdryness
field.devnotes: maximum ratio of flow to soil water storage during iteration in any layer

field.name: DayFlow1
field.devnotes: lower limit to soil water content [cm3/cm3]

field.name: CumDayFlow1
field.devnotes: upper flow rate, constant over one day [cm/d]

field.name: oldrunoff
field.devnotes: cumulative flow into layer 1 over the day [cm/d]

field.name: MaxInfil
field.devnotes: for saving old runoff rate value

field.name: wet
field.devnotes: number of layer where solution of equation system starts, mostly the first sometimes the second ..

field.name: success
field.devnotes: Wassergehalt kleiner b_rest im obersten Komp.?

field.name: fCompMethod
field.devnotes: was dt set during act. iteration

field.name: fShowWarnings
field.devnotes: Enumeration type variable for computation method

field.name: FVGParsFromTexture
field.devnotes: Switch for put Warnings on and off

field.name: Texture_version
field.devnotes: Option to take Van-Genuchten-Parameters from texture estimates

field.name: FKsFromTexture
field.devnotes: type for defining pedotransfer function either KA5 or RR

field.name: fred_f
field.devnotes: flag for writing texture VG-Pars into Param-Ini-file

field.name: dt_old
field.devnotes: Option for soil evaporation reduction function

field.name: PSI_dummy
field.devnotes: index of layer where maximum Weff is reached

field.name: nFKCalcMethod
field.devnotes: Enumeration type variable for initialisation method

field.name: alpha
field.devnotes: Option field, if true water contents are written into the next state ini-File of the control file

procedure.name: get_water_contents
procedure.devnotes: caculation of water transport according to diffusivity approach

procedure.name: Richardswater_solut
procedure.devnotes: caculation of water transport according to diffusivity approach

procedure.name: Mixedwater_solut
procedure.devnotes: caculation of water transport according to Richards equation approach

procedure.name: MixedHydruswater_solut
procedure.devnotes: caculation of water transport according to "Mixed" approach

procedure.name: GetWaterBalance
procedure.devnotes: caculation of water transport according to "Mixed Hydrus" approach

procedure.name: adjust_dt
procedure.devnotes: Calculation of new internal time step width

procedure.name: get_delt_iter_max
procedure.devnotes: adjust time step during picard iteration

procedure.name: set_new_state_vars
procedure.devnotes: Calculation of maximal water content change within an internal time step

procedure.name: CalcOverflow
procedure.devnotes: setting up the new state vars

devnotes.summary: TExternV represents an external variable in the model. Values of model elements outside a submodel are "external" and made accessible by linking to the source variable, often via a pointer.
TExternV represents an external variable in the model. Values of model elements outside a submodel are "external" and made accessible by linking to the source variable, often via a pointer.

procedure.name: SetCompMethod
procedure.devnotes: Diffusivit�ten [cm2/d] } specific water capacity intermediate variable dt.v/(C_arr*??) saturated hydraulic conductivities [cm/d] unges�ttigte hydraulische Leitf�higkeiten [cm/d] } Mittelwert der Diffusivit�t zwischen 2 Kompartimenten [cm2/d] } Mittelwert der unges�ttigten hydr. Leitf�higkeit zwischen 2 Kompartimenten [cm/d] } Intermediate variable Intermediate variable Intermediate variable[i] := 0.0; known values and solution vektor lower vector of the tri-diagonal matrix central vector of the tri-diagonal matrix upper vector of the tri-diagonal matrix Wassergehalte bei der letzten Iteration [cm3/cm3 } new soil water contents Feldkapazit�t [cm3/cm3] permanenter Welkepunkt [cm3/cm3] nutzbare Feldkapazit�t [cm3/cm3] alte Wasserfl�sse [cm/d] alte Wassergehalte New estimate of water potential [cm]

field.name: Dw_fact
field.devnotes: Mittelwert der unges�ttigten hydr. Leitf�higkeit zwischen 2 Kompartimenten [cm/d] }

field.name: lower
field.devnotes: Intermediate variable: TSoilArray; known values and solution vektor

field.name: diag
field.devnotes: lower vector of the tri-diagonal matrix

field.name: upper
field.devnotes: central vector of the tri-diagonal matrix

field.name: last_iter_theta
field.devnotes: upper vector of the tri-diagonal matrix

field.name: wf
field.devnotes: extrapolated soil water content for first iteration step

field.name: flow_ratio
field.devnotes: factor for calculation of flows in cases of near saturation

field.name: LowerBoundaryCondition
field.devnotes: ratio of flow to soil water storage

field.name: iter
field.devnotes: actual number of layers to be calculated, variable in case of groundwater influence

field.name: akt_bilanz_f
field.devnotes: number of iterations during internal time step

field.name: global_WaterBalance
field.devnotes: sum of soil and ponded water [mm]

field.name: Wflow_old
field.devnotes: Array der Van-Genuchten Parameter f�r jede Schicht

field.name: cumSW_Balance_arr
field.devnotes: actual values of water balance for single layers

field.name: nHorizons
field.devnotes: cumulative values of water balance for single layers

field.name: HoriNdx1
field.devnotes: number of soil horizons with different textures

field.name: FVGParsFromTextOption
field.devnotes: Index der untersten Schicht im jeweiligen Horizont

field.name: OptCompMethod
field.devnotes: Option for choosing the initialisaiton method

field.name: OptWriteParsFromTexture
field.devnotes: Option for choosing the computation method

field.name: OptTransferWGToNextIniFile
field.devnotes: Option for writing VG-Pars from Texture estimates into Param-Ini-file

field.name: FTextClass1Option
field.devnotes: depth of groundwatertable [cm] needed if option is selected

field.name: fLDClass1Option
field.devnotes: Options for choosing Parameters for 6 distinct horizons

field.name: max_aenderWG
field.devnotes: Options for choosing layer density for 6 distinct horizons

field.name: Max_dt
field.devnotes: maximum change of water content in a layer between two iterations

field.name: bsat_scaling
field.devnotes: maximum number of Iterations before internal time step is reduced

field.name: alpha_scaling
field.devnotes: Parameter for linear scaling of soil hydraulic Parameter bsat

field.name: b_sat1
field.devnotes: Parameter for linear scaling of soil hydraulic Parameter alpha van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 1

field.name: b_sat2
field.devnotes: nutzbare Feldkapazit�t van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 2

field.name: b_sat3
field.devnotes: nutzbare Feldkapazit�t van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 3

field.name: b_sat4
field.devnotes: nutzbare Feldkapazit�t van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 4

field.name: b_sat5
field.devnotes:
nutzbare Feldkapazit�t
van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 5

field.name: b_sat6
field.devnotes:
nutzbare Feldkapazit�t
van-Genuchten Parameter fuer Horizont 6

field.name: bil_nr
field.devnotes: For initalisation of Soil water contents and suction values

field.name: Weff
field.devnotes: Index of Layer where lower boundary fluxes are calculated

field.name: PondedWater
field.devnotes: Water-balance based on Evapotranspiration, losses and Rain

field.name: PondMax
field.devnotes: amount of ponded water on the soil surface [mm]

field.name: CumRunoff
field.devnotes: maximum ponding height [mm]; kumulative Bilanz [mm] zur Kontrolle!

field.name: SumPAVSoilWater
field.devnotes: sum of soil water down to boundary given by the Par "bil_nr"

field.name: SumPAvSoilWaterRZ
field.devnotes: sum of plant available soil water down to boundary given by the Par "bil_nr"

field.name: global_iter
field.devnotes: sum of plant available soil water in the rooting zone (down to Weff)

field.name: dt
field.devnotes: total number of iterations over the simulation run

field.name: SumOfInternalTimeSteps
field.devnotes: number of time steps per day

property.name: Ext_NetRain
property.devnotes: Option for Source of parameter Weff
